summary: Completed product progress review for Cycle 68. Validated 3 completed tasks (TASK-034, TASK-036, TASK-046) and 1 in-review task (TASK-084) against acceptance criteria. All tasks approved - implementations are solid, test coverage exceeds 80% target, and work aligns with product vision. No scope gaps identified. Phase 1 at 93.2% completion (41/44 tasks). Key recommendations: (1) QA should approve STORY-015 to unblock Phase 1 completion, (2) PM/Researcher should prioritize STORY-016 user testing in Cycle 69. Detailed review report saved to session workspace.
